rows.label: tev001501_MSG0001
rows.name:
And what do you want, mmm? Have
you found a mission that pays
enough to be worth my time?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG0002
rows.name: If so, I'm all ears. All. Ears.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG0003
rows.name:
But if you've simply come here to chat,
I can't promise that you'll live to
hear the end of our conversation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1001
rows.name: Ah, [ST:playername ]. Pleasure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1002
rows.name:
I was just thinking about how much
I'd enjoy working with a big strong
BLADE like yourself again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1003
rows.name:
No, no! I mean it. You really
should take me along.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001501_SEL0011
rows.name: Add the Murderess to your team.

rows.label: tev001501_JNK0020
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev001501_SEL0021
rows.name: Decline the Murderess's request for now.

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1004
rows.name:
Wonderful. Oh, and relax. I promise not
to shoot you in the back or anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1005
rows.name:
Well, that's a bummer. And here
I thought I might actually get
a decent payday for once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1010
rows.name:
What? You're going to an infamously
dangerous region just to reclaim
some old alien mech?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1011
rows.name: Pass. I don't see the profit in it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1016
rows.name:
So Little Miss Sweetness
is in trouble, eh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1017
rows.name:
Well, I'm certainly no fan of people
being killed by the Growth, so if you're
going to save her, I'll chip in.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_JNK0070
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001501_SEL0071
rows.name: Add the Murderess to your team.

rows.label: tev001501_JNK0080
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev001501_SEL0081
rows.name: Decline the Murderess's request for now.

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1018
rows.name:
Let's get going. I'll never be able to
cash in on favors from her if she dies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1019
rows.name:
Well, that's a shame. I thought it would
be an easy way to put her in my debt.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1024
rows.name:
If you're going to White Woods,
there's a good chance you might
find some undiscovered treasures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1025
rows.name:
Hmm... You know, if you need a hand, I
suppose I'd be willing to accompany you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_JNK0090
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001501_SEL0091
rows.name: Add the Murderess to your team.

rows.label: tev001501_JNK0100
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev001501_SEL0101
rows.name: Decline the Murderess's request for now.

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1026
rows.name:
Perfect! Oh, and I hope you understand that
if I'm going to such a dangerous place, I'll
need a reward commensurate with my efforts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1027
rows.name:
My, aren't we cocky! Well,
I'll overlook it this once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1032
rows.name:
How's that? You received another
mission straight from Vandham? My
my my, aren't we a big shot?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1033
rows.name:
I don't know what it entails, but I'm
sure Vandham rewards you well for these
sweetheart deals of his. So count me IN![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_JNK0110
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001501_SEL0111
rows.name: Add the Murderess to your team.

rows.label: tev001501_JNK0120
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev001501_SEL0121
rows.name: Decline the Murderess's request for now.

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1034
rows.name:
Heh heh heh. If I complete this
mission, I'll demand Vandham put
me on the sweetheart job track too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1035
rows.name:
Shame. We'd have made
such a lucrative team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1040
rows.name:
Who knows what a man like that is
thinking? Or what he'll do next?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1041
rows.name:
He needs to be removed from the picture
before he can do something else foolish.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_JNK0130
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001501_SEL0131
rows.name: Add the Murderess to your team.

rows.label: tev001501_JNK0140
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev001501_SEL0141
rows.name: Decline the Murderess's request for now.

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1042
rows.name: Nice. I'll go sharpen my killin' blade.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1043
rows.name:
Without me, is Team Goody Two-shoes
really equipped to do what needs
to be done to that man?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1048
rows.name:
No matter how much money you hoard, you
still need to be alive to spend it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1049
rows.name:
So it's imperative that we complete
this mission. ...That's WE. Not
you and someone else. We.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_JNK0150
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001501_SEL0151
rows.name: Add the Murderess to your team.

rows.label: tev001501_JNK0160
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev001501_SEL0161
rows.name: Decline the Murderess's request for now.

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1051
rows.name:
Does finding the Central Life
take us closer to heaven or
hell? I can't wait to find out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1052
rows.name:
Hmm. Well then, good luck. Oh,
and make sure you succeed, okay?
Because if you don't...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1053
rows.name:
...I'll find you in hell
and kill you again. Ta-ta![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1058
rows.name:
The war is over, and the attention of Mira's
inhabitants has turned back to the accumulation
of wealth. It's about damn time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1059
rows.name:
And you better BELIEVE I'm
getting in on the action. So
take me with you already![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_JNK0170
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001501_SEL0171
rows.name: Add the Murderess to your team.

rows.label: tev001501_JNK0180
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev001501_SEL0181
rows.name: Decline the Murderess's request for now.

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1060
rows.name:
Good. For my part, I'll see to
it that any fools who stand in
our way are expediently removed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001501_MSG1061
rows.name:
Shame. We'd have made
such a lucrative team.[ST:wait ]
